On the note of finishing pieces one of my friends always said its like XP in a video game You get way more experience for finishing the level completing an artwork than you do for defeating a few enemies starting a bunch of pieces and never finishing them Its a dumb analogy but it really stuck with me

Honestly I think its true You improve way faster by finishing a bunch of smaller pieces than by having a folder full of giant unfinished projects The act of pushing a piece all the way to the end is where a lot of the learning happens and it clearly shows in how quickly you have grown your art
